name: io.github.benchoi93/refcheck
title: refcheck
description: Verify academic citations against real databases. Catches hallucinated references, exports BibTeX.

environmentVariables.name: CROSSREF_EMAIL
environmentVariables.description: Your email for Crossref polite pool (faster rate limits)

environmentVariables.name: S2_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Semantic Scholar API key (free, from semanticscholar.org/product/api)

environmentVariables.name: ELSEVIER_INSTTOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Elsevier institutional token for higher rate limits

environmentVariables.name: ADS_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: NASA ADS API token (free, from ui.adsabs.harvard.edu account settings)
